modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Wi-Fi connection keeps dropping on eduroam network.

full_description_text: I have a problem with my Wi-Fi in the dorms. Every time I leave and come back, I have to register again. It’s really annoying because my Apple device doesn’t connect automatically. Can someone help me with this?
short_description: Wi-Fi connection keeps dropping on eduroam network.
description: I have a problem with my Wi-Fi in the dorms. Every time I leave and come back, I have to register again. It’s really annoying because my Apple device doesn’t connect automatically. Can someone help me with this?
